name: Reliance SBI Card PRIME
exclusions: upi payments for selected accelerated Reliance categories
transactions excluded under Reliance SBI Card PRIME terms
milestoneBenefits: Reliance Retail vouchers worth Rs 8,750 on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh or more at participating Reliance Retail stores
Renewal fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh or more
additionalBenefits: Reliance Retail voucher worth Rs 3,000 as welcome gift
Additional Reliance discount vouchers worth up to Rs 11,999 at participating Reliance Retail stores
20 Reward Points per Rs 100 on AJIO and JioMart online spends, except UPI payments
10 Reward Points per Rs 100 at other participating Reliance Retail stores, except UPI payments
5 Reward Points per Rs 100 on dining, movies and entertainment, domestic airline and international spends
2 Reward Points per Rs 100 on other eligible retail purchases
One monthly BookMyShow movie ticket benefit worth up to Rs 250, subject to product terms
8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter
4 complimentary international lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions, capped as per product terms
